questions.question: The company's new policy will _____ effect next month.
questions.explanation: 'Take effect' là cụm từ cố định nghĩa là 'có hiệu lực'

questions.question: All employees are required to _____ the safety training.
questions.explanation: Sau 'to' cần động từ nguyên mẫu

questions.question: The meeting has been _____ until next week.
questions.explanation: Câu bị động: has been + V3/ed
